segments.text: In that day you will say,
I will give thanks to you, Yahweh; for though you were angry with me, your anger has turned away and you comfort me.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Behold, God is my salvation. I will trust, and will not be afraid; for Yah, Yahweh, is my strength and song; and he has become my salvation.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Therefore with joy you will draw water out of the wells of salvation.
In that day you will say,
Give thanks to Yahweh! Call on his name! Declare his doings among the peoples! Proclaim that his name is exalted!
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Sing to Yahweh, for he has done excellent things! Let this be known in all the earth!
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Cry aloud and shout, you inhabitant of Zion, for the Holy One of Israel is great among you!
segments.speaker: Unknown
